summary: Adopt SQL-first, deny-by-default agentic governance model extracted from a prior product repo
details: SQLite is the source of truth; generated mirrors are reviewable but never bulk-loaded.

summary: Implemented the SQL-first backlog engine and reviewable schema/dump exports
backlog:validate passes on the seeded database
Risk-class guardrail policy validates with deny-by-default and per-class confirmation
Authored AI-security eval scenarios mapped to OWASP LLM and NIST AI-RMF risks
Context broker emits bounded packets and forbids bulk-loading generated mirrors
Measured packet sizes: a bounded route packet is a few KB versus multi-MB generated mirrors
details: See docs/token-reduction.md for the measurement method.

summary: Waived the product-specific route-registry gate in the extracted platform
details: Reason: route registry is product-specific. Risk: low, platform ships CLI routes only. Rollback: re-add the gate when a host app provides a route registry.

summary: Added Zach Reeder-authored static HTML setup guide for platform setup, skill installation, and direct publication
Updated setup guide and GitHub-facing copy for ADG branding, Otterblock details, and manual install
evidence: npm registry checks returned 404 for ADG package names
